version_description: This song covers all the correct chords plus assorted riffs during the song. Be sure to listen to the recording to get the acoustic strumming pattern and hammer-ons for the intro chords.

versions.version_description: Gno3 is G played without the 3rd finger, same goes for Cno3. First part of intro plays throughout whole song.
This song is tuned down 1/2 step. (D# G# C# F# A# D#). Use a fixed-width font or the tab part and chords will not line up properly.

tuning: Eb Ab Db Gb Bb Eb
content:
Everything You Want
Vertical Horizon

[ch]Am[/ch]    x02210
[ch]Em[/ch]    022000
[ch]G/B[/ch]   x2x030
[ch]Cadd2[/ch] x32030

[ch]Am7[/ch]   x02013
[ch]G[/ch]     320033
[ch]Em7[/ch]   022033
[ch]D[/ch]     xx0232

RIFF 1
Intro Chords w/RIFF 1

[Intro Chords]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]G/B[/ch] [ch]Cadd2[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch] 
 Somewhere there's speaking[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]             [ch]Cadd2[/ch]    
 It's already coming in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G/B[/ch]           [ch]Cadd2[/ch]         
 Oh and it's rising at the back of your mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
 You never could get it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 Unless you were fed it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 Now you're here and you don't know why[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G/B[/ch]        [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 But under skinned knees and the skid marks[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]       [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 Past the places where you used to learn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
 You howl and listen[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]Cadd2[/ch]    
 Listen and wait for the[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 Echoes of angels who won't return[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
He's everything you want[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
He's everything you need[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
He's everything inside of you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
That you wish you could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
He says all the right things[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
At exactly the right time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
But he means nothing to you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
And you don't know why[/tab]

[Instrumental]
Intro Chords w/RIFF 1 and RIFF 2 (x2)

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
 You're waiting for someone[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]            [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 To put you together[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G/B[/ch]        [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 You're waiting for someone to push you away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]        [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 There's always another wound to discover[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 There's always something more you wish he'd say[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
He's everything you want[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
He's everything you need[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
He's everything inside of you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
That you wish you could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
He says all the right things[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
At exactly the right time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
But he means nothing to you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
And you don't know why[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 But you'll just sit tight[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
And watch it unwind[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
It's only what you're asking for[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
 And you'll be just fine[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
With all of your time[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Cadd2[/ch]    [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
It's only what you're waiting for[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
Out of the island[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Into the highway[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]           [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
Past the places where you might have turned[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]
You never did notice[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/B[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
But you still hide away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G/B[/ch]     [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
The anger of angels who won't return[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
He's everything you want[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
He's everything you need[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
He's everything inside of you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
That you wish you could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
He says all the right things[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
At exactly the right time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]
But he means nothing to you[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
And you don't know why[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I am everything you want[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I am everything you need[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I am everything inside of you[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
That you wish you could be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I say all the right things[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
At exactly the right time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Em7[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]
But I mean nothing to you and I don't know why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G/B[/ch]         [ch]Cadd2[/ch]  x4 
                       And I don't know why[/tab]
